items.title: LeBron James Agrees To Two-Year, $8M Deal With 76ers
items.originalTitle: LeBron James Agrees To Two-Year, $8M Deal With 76ers
items.headlineZh: 勒布朗·詹姆斯 Agrees 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: 勒布朗·詹姆斯 Agrees 签约动向更新
items.summary:
LeBron James has agreed to sign a two-year, $8 million with the Philadelphia 76ers. James will have a player option for Year 2.

James revealed that he was strongly considering retirement going into the offseason.

James also considered signing with the Cleveland Cavaliers, Miami Heat, Golden State Warriors and Minnesota Timberwolves. James will form a core alongside Tyrese Maxey, Jaylen Brown, Joel Embiid and VJ Edgecombe.

"I thought I was done when the season ended," said James in a statement. "I wasn't ready to announce it, and I knew I needed some time to really decide, but I was pretty sure I played my last game. I was honest at that last press conference when I said I needed to look at myself and deicide if I still love this game. I still truly love this game, and I have more to give.

"The last few weeks have really been special. I've never been able to have no clue what to do and take real time to just think. I've had an incredible few months with all the people I love trying to figure it all out. This is my last decision. I'm not going for money. I'm not going for family. What am I really playing for at this point?

"I still want to sacrifice. I still want to work. I still want to grind. I still want to compete, to win and to have a chance at the feeling of winning another championship.

"I believe I can help make the Philadelphia 76ers a championship team and I am so excited to energize a new fan base and start this incredible journey one last time.

"Thank you LA. Miami I'll forever love and Northeast Ohio will always home!"
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，勒布朗·詹姆斯 Agrees 的签约或合同动向成为焦点，原文围绕其自由市场前景展开。

items.title: Oscar Tshiebwe Signs With Rockets
items.originalTitle: Oscar Tshiebwe Signs With Rockets
items.headlineZh: Oscar Tshiebwe Signs 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: Oscar Tshiebwe Signs 签约动向更新
items.summary:
The Houston Rockets have signed free agent forward/center Oscar Tshiebwe.

Tshiebwe (6-9, 265) was eligible for the 2023 NBA Draft following his senior season at Kentucky. He spent his rookie season as a two-way player with Indiana in 2023-24 and the past two seasons on a two-way contract with the Utah Jazz.

In 49 career games with seven starts, Tshiebwe has averaged 7.0 points and 6.5 rebounds in 15.2 minutes per game.

items.title: LeBron James Looked For Cavs To Trade For Kyrie Irving To Join Him In Cleveland
items.originalTitle: LeBron James Looked For Cavs To Trade For Kyrie Irving To Join Him In Cleveland
items.headlineZh: 勒布朗·詹姆斯 Looked 交易影响继续发酵
items.titleZh: 勒布朗·詹姆斯 Looked 交易影响继续发酵
items.summary:
LeBron James had been pushing for former teammate Kyrie Irving to join him in a potential return to the Cleveland Cavaliers, according to league sources. The Dallas Mavericks, however, have shown no interest in engaging the Cavaliers on a trade, and Irving is believed to be comfortable remaining where he is.

That reported effort adds another layer to James' complicated free agency decision, one that continues to weigh a possible third stint in Cleveland against a return to the Miami Heat, where he won two championships and two MVP awards from 2010 to 2014.

Cleveland's roster already features high-usage playmakers in Donovan Mitchell and James Harden, meaning James' addition alone likely wouldn't resolve the team's most pressing need. The Cavaliers' actual weakness lies up front where Jarrett Allen and Evan Mobley struggled to hold ground during their conference finals loss to the eventual champion New York Knicks.

Miami, by contrast, presents a more straightforward opportunity for James at this stage of his career. The Heat recently acquired two-time MVP Giannis Antetokounmpo, and pairing James with Antetokounmpo and Bam Adebayo would allow him to slot into a complementary role rather than shoulder primary playmaking duties, something he last did successfully during the 2019-20 season with the Lakers.

A former teammate told ESPN that James, soon to turn 42, no longer needs this final stretch of his career to be defined by another championship.

"To be the GOAT, you got to win championships, etc. Now that's settled," said the former teammate. "Now it's about his joy, his happiness. If it ends in a championship, great. But he won't be defined by how this ends."

That same source suggested Miami would allow James to focus purely on playing basketball without added pressure.

"He can play freely," said the source. "He can be Tom Brady late in his career, not worrying about being the hero."
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，勒布朗·詹姆斯 Looked 相关交易成为焦点，原文讨论这笔操作对球队阵容和后续走势的影响。
items.oneLineZh: 勒布朗·詹姆斯 Looked 交易影响继续发酵
items.displayTitle: LeBron James Looked For Cavs To Trade For Kyrie Irving To Join Him In Cleveland

items.title: Mouhamadou Gueye To Join Valencia Basket In Spain

items.headlineZh: Mouhamadou Gueye To 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Mouhamadou Gueye To 相关消息更新
items.summary:
Forward Mouhamadou Gueye is set to join Valencia Basket in Spain for the upcoming season. The Spanish club even announced the addition of Gueye, despite the 6-foot-9 forward not having been waived by the Charlotte Hornets yet.

Gueye finished last season with the Chicago Bulls. He's also played for the Toronto Raptors in the NBA, as well as four different G League franchises.

In order to satisfy trade rules as part of the four-team trade between the Bulls, Hornets, Brooklyn Nets and Minnesota Timberwolves, Gueye was sent from Chicago to Charlotte. The Hornets are expected to waive Gueye, as the team is facing a roster crunch.

items.title: Warriors Open To Signing Short-Term Extension With Steph Curry
items.originalTitle: Warriors Open To Signing Short-Term Extension With Steph Curry
items.headlineZh: Open To Signing 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: Open To Signing 签约动向更新
items.summary:
The Golden State Warriors are open to signing a one or two-year extension with Steph Curry, according to Anthony Slater of ESPN.

Curry will be extension-eligible on August 29.

"If he wants a one-year extension at big money, if he wants a two-year extension - the Warriors are very open to that conversation.

"I think they want to see how this roster looks in the short-term and long-term, and by the time we get to late August when he's eligible, Steph Curry and the Warriors will sit down and decide," said Slater.

Curry is currently on a one-year, $62 million deal.

It was reported last week that the Warriors still need to add another star in order to have a shot at signing LeBron James.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Open To Signing 的签约或合同动向成为焦点，原文围绕其自由市场前景展开。
items.oneLineZh: Open To Signing 签约动向更新

items.title: Jae'Sean Tate, Rockets Agree To One-Year, $3.07M Deal

items.headlineZh: Jae'Sean Tate 与火箭达成一年，307 万美元合同
items.titleZh: Jae'Sean Tate 与火箭达成一年，307 万美元合同
items.summary:
Jae'Sean Tate and the Houston Rockets have agreed to a one-year, $3.07 million contract. The deal is partially guaranteed for $1.04 million.

Tate appeared in 46 games last season with the Rockets, averaging 2.8 points and 1.6 rebounds in 8.8 minutes. Tate's minutes have decreased each season of his career down from when he played in 29.2 minutes per game as a rookie and was a First Team All-Rookie selection.

Tate will be playing in his age-30 NBA season.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，Jae'Sean Tate 与火箭达成一年，307 万美元合同。

items.title: LeBron James May Remain Genuinely Undecided On Free Agency Decision
items.originalTitle: LeBron James May Remain Genuinely Undecided On Free Agency Decision
items.headlineZh: 勒布朗·詹姆斯 May 签约动向更新
items.titleZh: 勒布朗·詹姆斯 May 签约动向更新
items.summary:
LeBron James still had not announced a decision on his next team, 24 days after confirming he would not return to the Los Angeles Lakers fort he 2026-27 season. A source close to James offered a candid assessment of the situation.

"Nobody knows right now except LeBron," the source told The Athletic. "And I'm not even sure LeBron knows."

The prolonged wait has left the Cleveland Cavaliers, Golden State Warriors, Miami Heat, Minnesota Timberwolves and Philadelphia 76ers all in limbo as they wait to see whether James will sign or whether they need to pivot toward strengthening their rosters elsewhere. James addressed the timeline last Thursday during an appearance at Fanatics Fest in New York.

"I won't hold you guys up too much longer," said James.

James' agent, Rich Paul, has said he has already communicated everything necessary to the five teams considered front-runners for James' services. Paul addressed his approach during an appearance on his own podcast this week.

"Is there anything more we should be doing? We could be doing?" said Paul. "No. We don't need you to go above and beyond about anything. We understand it. It's clear. All the messages have been sent."

Speculation has continued to swirl in the absence of concrete information, including reports of a since-deleted Heat YouTube link referencing a July 27 press conference, which the team described as an honest mistake. Sources close to James also dismissed rumors that he had reversed a prior decision, calling those claims false.

Only two teams have made roster moves directly tied to pursuing James. Warriors forward Draymond Green, also represented by Paul, declined his player option in late June in coordination with Golden State's front office to create flexibility for potentially signing James and trading for Anthony Davis. Sources said there were no guarantees attached to that move. Meanwhile, James Harden has remained unsigned as part of a plan to preserve Cleveland's ability to sign James, a strategy Harden has publicly confirmed as the team's goal.
items.summaryZh: 据 RealGM 报道，勒布朗·詹姆斯 May 的签约或合同动向成为焦点，原文围绕其自由市场前景展开。
items.oneLineZh: 勒布朗·詹姆斯 May 签约动向更新
originalTitles: LeBron James Not Waiting On Another Transaction Before Making Decision
LeBron James May Remain Genuinely Undecided On Free Agency Decision
items.displayTitle: LeBron James May Remain Genuinely Undecided On Free Agency Decision

items.summary:
Jordan Walsh and the Boston Celtics have agreed to a three-year, $16 million contract extension. The deal will begin with the 2027-28 season as the Celtics previously picked up their 2026-27 option on him in June. Walsh is represented by Ramon Sessions.

Walsh appeared in 68 games last season with the Celtics, averaging 5.4 points and 4.0 rebounds in 68 minutes.

Walsh was the 38th overall pick in the 2023 draft out of Arkansas.

Walsh is now signed through 2030 and joins Neemias Queta with a multi-year extension this offseason with the Celtics.

items.title: Rockets Sign Isaiah Crawford To Contract
items.originalTitle: Rockets Sign Isaiah Crawford To Contract
items.headlineZh: 火箭签下 Isaiah Crawford To
items.titleZh: 火箭签下 Isaiah Crawford To
items.summary:
The Houston Rockets have re-signed forward Isaiah Crawford.

Crawford appeared in 14 games as a two-way player for the Rockets in 2025-26, averaging 11.0 points, 6.3 rebounds, 2.0 assists and 1.2 blocks per 36 minutes played. He recorded career highs of 11 points and 6 rebounds in the season finale vs. Memphis on April 12.

In 20 games while transferred to the Rockets G League affiliate, Rio Grande Valley, Crawford averaged 19.0 ppg, 7.6 rpg, 3.1 apg and 2.1 spg while shooting 51.5% from the floor and 39.2% from 3-point range.

Crawford was was a two-way player for Sacramento in 2024-25 and helped its G League affiliate, Stockton, win the championship.

items.title: Victor Wembanyama: Discount Meant To Keep Money From Limiting Spurs' Title Chances
items.originalTitle: Victor Wembanyama: Discount Meant To Keep Money From Limiting Spurs' Title Chances
items.headlineZh: 维克托·文班亚马相关消息更新
items.titleZh: 维克托·文班亚马相关消息更新
items.summary:
Victor Wembanyama explained his decision to sign a five-year, $252 million extension below supermax value, saying the choice was designed to preserve the San Antonio Spurs' championship contention window. The Spurs announced the deal July 10, which begins with the 2027-28 season and starts at 25 percent of the salary cap rather than the 30 percent supermax figure Wembanyama was eligible to receive.

Wembanyama addressed his reasoning in an interview with The Athletic, tied to his announcement as a cover athlete for NBA 2K27.

"We have a good team, we had a very good playoff run, and we had a very good regular season. But what's even better and greater is our potential," said Wembanyama. "The reality of today's NBA is that often, the potential of teams is not fulfilled because of money. I just want to make sure it's never our case."

The decision could save San Antonio roughly $50 million over the life of the extension, offering the front office added flexibility for trades or additional signings as the team looks to build around its young core. Wembanyama, a two-time All-Star and the NBA's first unanimous Defensive Player of the Year, averaged career highs of 25 points and 11.5 rebounds last season while leading the league with 3.1 blocks per game, helping San Antonio reach its first NBA Finals appearance during his tenure. He earned First-Team All-NBA honors and finished third in MVP voting.

Wembanyama acknowledged the rapid pace of his accomplishments while insisting he remains unsatisfied.

"Just like every achievement in my career, I wish it happened sooner," said Wembanyama. "It's all happening very quick, but I am not satisfied and I want it to happen quicker. It's definitely a big milestone, something good. That's done."

According to The Athletic's John Hollinger, maintaining Wembanyama's cap figure at 25 percent rather than supermax level would also allow the Spurs to use their full nontaxpayer midlevel exception in the 2027 offseason while remaining below the first luxury tax apron, an option that would otherwise require trading a rotation piece. That flexibility becomes increasingly important as San Antonio looks to extend young players like Stephon Castle and Dylan Harper in the coming years.

Wembanyama also addressed the growing attention surrounding his game, both on the court and in broader basketball culture.

"I see it, and I feel it with people around me," said Wembanyama. "Whether it's fans or interactions, even haters, you know it's everywhere. But mentally, it's not taking a toll on me, I'm just living my career. I hear it the most with journalists and media. But, yeah, it comes with it. I guess it's only a good thing."

Wembanyama joins previous 2K cover athletes including Michael Jordan, Shaquille O'Neal, LeBron James, Kobe Bryant, Allen Iverson and Luka Doncic. He recalled playing the game growing up in France with his brother and uncle.

"I know it means a lot culturally, too," said Wembanyama. "It's hard to realize for me that I'm taking more and more space, more real estate in the world of basketball, in what basketball means, in professional basketball."
items.oneLineZh: 维克托·文班亚马相关消息更新
items.displayTitle: Victor Wembanyama: Discount Meant To Keep Money From Limiting Spurs' Title Chances

items.title: Bradley Beal Drawing Interest From Heat, Celtics, Clippers
items.originalTitle: Bradley Beal Drawing Interest From Heat, Celtics, Clippers
items.headlineZh: Bradley Beal Drawing 相关消息更新
items.titleZh: Bradley Beal Drawing 相关消息更新
items.summary:
Veteran guard Bradley Beal is expected to sign with a playoff contender, after opting out of his contract with the LA Clippers. Beal is drawing interest from the Miami Heat and Boston Celtics. A return to the Clippers also can't be ruled out.

The Heat are looking to add depth and shooting after acquiring Giannis Antetokounmpo this offseason. Beal has a longstanding friendship with Jayson Tatum, after both grew up in St. Louis, which has the Celtics in play.

Beal appeared in just six games for the Clippers last season, as he suffered a left hip fracture in early November. The veteran shooting guard joined LA after being waived-and-stretched by the Phoenix Suns. Beal is expected to be healthy and ready for training camp this fall.

Jamarion Sharp and the Los Angeles Clippers have agreed to a two-way deal.

Sharp was the G League Defensive Player of the Year last season, averaging 7.7 points, 7.3 rebounds and 3.9 blocks in 25.1 minutes over 39 games with the Texas Legends.

Sharp went undrafted out of Ole Miss in 2024.

items.title: Jalen Slawson, Pacers Agree To Two-Way Deal
items.originalTitle: Jalen Slawson, Pacers Agree To Two-Way Deal
items.headlineZh: Jalen Slawson 与步行者达成双向合同
items.titleZh: Jalen Slawson 与步行者达成双向合同
items.summary:
Jalen Slawson and the Indiana Pacers have agreed to a two-way deal. Slawson is represented by Aaron Turner and was the 54th overall pick in the 2023 NBA draft out of Furman by the Sacramento Kings.

Slawson appeared in 13 games with the Pacers last season while on a two-way, averaging 7.3 points, 4.4 rebounds and 2.8 assists in 23.9 minutes.

Lawson also appeared in 37 G League games, averaging 19.3 points, 7.3 rebounds, 5.4 assists, 1.3 steals and 2.3 blocks.

items.title: Yaxel Lendeborg, Caleb Wilson, Cameron Boozer Headline 2026 NBA All-Sumer League Teams
items.originalTitle: Yaxel Lendeborg, Caleb Wilson, Cameron Boozer Headline 2026 NBA All-Sumer League Teams
items.headlineZh: 亚克塞尔·伦德伯格相关消息更新
items.titleZh: 亚克塞尔·伦德伯格相关消息更新
items.summary:
Memphis Grizzlies rookie Cameron Boozer, Milwaukee Bucks guard Brayden Burries, Golden State Warriors forward Yaxel Lendeborg, Cleveland Cavaliers guard Meleek Thomas and Chicago Bulls forward Caleb Wilson earned First Team honors.

Lendeborg was also Summer League MVP as he led the Warriors to the Summer League championship.

In six Vegas Summer League games, Boozer averaged 18.5 points, 8.0 rebounds, 3.7 assists and 1.8 steals in 29.5 minutes. Wilson appeared in four Summer League games, averaging 23.5 points, 7.2 rebounds, 1.8 assists, 1.2 steals and 2.5 blocks. Lendeborg averaged 14.9 points, 6.8 rebounds, 4.0 assists and 1.4 steals in 26.9 minutes.

The Second Team includes Memphis Grizzlies forward Cedric Coward, Brooklyn Nets guard Egor Demin, Phoenix Suns center Khaman Maluach, Charlotte Hornets forward Liam McNeeley and Minnesota Timberwolves guard Zyon Pullin.
items.dekZh: Lendeborg 场均14.9分，6.8篮板，4.0助攻和1.4抢断，出场26.9分钟。
